abstract: Displays an annotation string in an annotation window.
overview:
## Discussion

An annotation string explains or comments on the candidate string in the candidates window. An annotation window is a small, borderless window that is aligned with the current candidates window. An input method calls `showAnnotation:` when the `candidateSelectionChanged:` method of the [doc://com.apple.inputmethodkit/documentation/InputMethodKit/IMKInputController] class is called, and the candidate string has annotations.

# showAnnotation(_:)

**Instance Method**

Displays an annotation string in an annotation window.

## Declaration

```swift
func showAnnotation(_ annotationString: NSAttributedString!)
```

## Parameters

- **annotationString**: The string to display.

## Discussion

An annotation string explains or comments on the candidate string in the candidates window. An annotation window is a small, borderless window that is aligned with the current candidates window. An input method calls `showAnnotation:` when the `candidateSelectionChanged:` method of the [doc://com.apple.inputmethodkit/documentation/InputMethodKit/IMKInputController] class is called, and the candidate string has annotations.
title: showAnnotation(_:)
